# Regulations to the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties

Jurisdiction: Mexico
Region: MX
Citation: Reglamento de la Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales en Posesión de los Particulares
Authority: Mexican Government / INAI
Source URL: https://www.diputados.gob.mx/LeyesBiblio/regley/Reg_LFPDPPP.pdf
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer
Keywords: LFPDPPP regulations, ARCO rights, privacy notice, Mexico

## Summary
Mexican implementing regulation detailing privacy notices, consent, ARCO rights, transfers, security, and data-controller obligations.

## Key compliance obligations
- Implement detailed privacy notice and consent requirements.
- Support ARCO rights procedures.
- Control transfers and processor relationships.
